yn_notice.legal_obligation: Provide clear notice specifying purpose of processing, rights of Data Principal, and grievance mechanism.
yn_notice.risk_event: Absence of valid privacy notice prior to data collection.

yn_consent_valid.legal_obligation: Obtain free, specific, informed, and unambiguous consent through clear affirmative action.

yn_consent_record.risk_event: Inability to demonstrate lawful basis of processing.

yn_legitimate_use.legal_obligation: Processing without consent must fall strictly within legitimate use categories.
yn_legitimate_use.risk_event: Improper reliance on legitimate use provision.

tc_security_safeguards.legal_obligation: Implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to prevent data breach.
tc_security_safeguards.risk_event: Failure to implement encryption, access control, or monitoring.

yn_breach_notification.legal_obligation: Notify Data Protection Board and affected individuals upon personal data breach.
yn_breach_notification.risk_event: Delayed or absent breach notification mechanism.

yn_child_parental_consent.legal_obligation: Obtain verifiable parental consent before processing personal data of a child.
yn_child_parental_consent.risk_event: Processing minors' data without parental verification.

yn_child_tracking.legal_obligation: Prohibition of tracking, behavioral monitoring, or targeted advertising directed at children.

yn_grievance.risk_event: Absence of internal complaint resolution mechanism.

yn_accountability.legal_obligation: Appoint responsible officer and implement compliance oversight (if applicable).
